categories.label: Museum and Collection
categories.description: Museums, house museums, and specialized public collections.

categories.label: Religious Heritage
categories.description: Churches, cathedrals, basilicas, sanctuaries, abbeys, and related heritage.

categories.label: Historic Architecture
categories.description: Historically or architecturally notable buildings and complexes.

categories.label: Monument and Memorial
categories.description: Monuments, memorials, commemorative markers, and war memorials.

categories.label: Public Art
categories.description: Publicly accessible artworks in urban space.

categories.label: Archaeological or Ancient Site
categories.description: Archaeological remains and ancient heritage sites.

categories.label: Urban Landmark
categories.description: Recognizable civic and urban landmarks such as squares, gates, towers, and walls.

categories.label: Performing Arts and Entertainment
categories.description: Theatres, cinemas, cinetheques, and similar venues.

categories.label: Park, Garden, and Nature
categories.description: Parks, gardens, green heritage, and notable urban nature sites.

categories.label: Cemetery and Funerary Heritage
categories.description: Cemeteries, mausoleums, ossuaries, and funerary heritage.

categories.label: Science and Education Attraction
categories.description: Planetariums, observatories, aquariums, and similar attractions.

categories.label: District and Streetscape
categories.description: Named quarters, historic districts, and urban-character areas kept as context.

categories.label: Special Interest Attraction
categories.description: Optional city-specific attractions such as hippodromes, scenic viewpoints, and waterfront features.
